en: "If you return, O Israel, declares the LORD, to me you should return. If you remove your detestable things from my presence, and do not waver,
zh: “以色列啊！你要是回轉， 就當回轉歸向我。” 這是耶和華的宣告。 “如果你從我面前除掉你可憎的偶像， 不到處浪蕩；

en: and if you swear, 'As the LORD lives,' in truth, in justice, and in righteousness, then nations shall bless themselves in him, and in him shall they glory."
zh: 如果你憑真理、公正、公義， 指著永活的耶和華起誓； 列國就必因耶和華蒙福， 也必以他為榮。”

en: For thus says the LORD to the men of Judah and Jerusalem: "Break up your fallow ground, and sow not among thorns.
zh: 耶和華對猶大和耶路撒冷的人這樣說： “你們要為自己開墾未經耕耘之地， 卻不要撒種在荊棘中！

en: Circumcise yourselves to the LORD; remove the foreskin of your hearts, O men of Judah and inhabitants of Jerusalem; lest my wrath go forth like fire, and burn with none to quench it, because of the evil of your deeds."
zh: 猶大人和耶路撒冷的居民哪！ 你們要為了耶和華的緣故自行割禮， 除去心裡的污穢； 不然，我的忿怒必因你們的惡行， 如火一般發出來， 無人能熄滅！”

en: Declare in Judah, and proclaim in Jerusalem, and say, "Blow the trumpet through the land; cry aloud and say, 'Assemble, and let us go into the fortified cities!'
zh: “你們應當在猶大宣告， 在耶路撒冷傳揚，說： ‘要在境內吹號。’ 高聲呼叫，說： ‘你們要集合起來，我們要進到堅固的城裡去！’

en: Raise a standard toward Zion, flee for safety, stay not, for I bring disaster from the north, and great destruction.
zh: 要向錫安豎起旗號， 趕快逃命，不可停留， 因為我必使災禍與嚴重的毀滅， 從北方而來。”

en: A lion has gone up from his thicket, a destroyer of nations has set out; he has gone out from his place to make your land a waste; your cities will be ruins without inhabitant.
zh: 獅子從牠的密林中上來了， 毀壞列國的已經動身， 從他的本處出發， 為要使你的地荒涼， 使你的城市破毀，無人居住。

en: For this put on sackcloth, lament, and wail, for the fierce anger of the LORD has not turned back from us."
zh: 因此，你們應當披上麻布， 痛哭哀號， 因為耶和華的烈怒， 還沒有離開我們。

en: "In that day, declares the LORD, courage shall fail both king and officials. The priests shall be appalled and the prophets astounded."
zh: “到那日，君王和首領的勇氣消失， 祭司也要驚惶， 先知都必詫異。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Then I said, "Ah, Lord GOD, surely you have utterly deceived this people and Jerusalem, saying, 'It shall be well with you,' whereas the sword has reached their very life."
zh: 於是我說：“噢！主耶和華啊！你真的欺騙了這人民，也欺騙了耶路撒冷，說：‘你們必平安無事’，其實刀劍已經架在頸項上了！”

en: At that time it will be said to this people and to Jerusalem, "A hot wind from the bare heights in the desert toward the daughter of my people, not to winnow or cleanse,
zh: 到那時，必有話對這人民和耶路撒冷說：“有一陣熱風從曠野光禿的高岡，颳向我的子民 ，不是為簸散，也不是為揚淨；

en: a wind too full for this comes for me. Now it is I who speak in judgment upon them."
zh: 這過強的風要為我颳來，我就要向他們宣告我的判詞。”

en: Behold, he comes up like clouds; his chariots like the whirlwind; his horses are swifter than eagles- woe to us, for we are ruined!
zh: 看哪！他必如密雲湧聚， 他的戰車如旋風， 他的馬比鷹還快。 我們有禍了，我們滅亡了！

en: O Jerusalem, wash your heart from evil, that you may be saved. How long shall your wicked thoughts lodge within you?
zh: 耶路撒冷啊！洗淨你心中的邪惡， 使你可以得救！ 你心存惡念， 要到幾時呢？

en: For a voice declares from Dan and proclaims trouble from Mount Ephraim.
zh: 因為有聲音從但宣告， 從以法蓮山傳出災禍的警報。

en: Warn the nations that he is coming; announce to Jerusalem, "Besiegers come from a distant land; they shout against the cities of Judah.
zh: “要向列國提說， 向耶路撒冷宣揚： ‘圍攻的人從遠地而來， 向猶大的各城鎮大聲吶喊。

en: Like keepers of a field are they against her all around, because she has rebelled against me, declares the LORD.
zh: 他們四面包圍耶路撒冷， 好像看守田地的人一樣， 因為耶路撒冷背叛了我。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Your ways and your deeds have brought this upon you. This is your doom, and it is bitter; it has reached your very heart."
zh: “你這一切災禍是你的所作所為作成的， 這就是你的惡果， 實在是苦，直透心底。”

en: My anguish, my anguish! I writhe in pain! Oh the walls of my heart! My heart is beating wildly; I cannot keep silent, for I hear the sound of the trumpet, the alarm of war.
zh: 我的肺腑，我的肺腑啊！我絞痛欲絕。 我的心哪！我的心在我裡面顫抖， 我不能緘默不語。 我的靈啊！我聽見了號角的聲音， 也聽見了戰爭的吶喊。

en: Crash follows hard on crash; the whole land is laid waste. Suddenly my tents are laid waste, my curtains in a moment.
zh: 毀滅的消息頻傳， 因為全國盡都毀壞， 我的帳棚忽然毀壞， 我的幔子轉瞬破裂。

en: How long must I see the standard and hear the sound of the trumpet?
zh: 我看見旗號要到幾時呢？ 我聽見號角的聲音要到幾時呢？

en: "For my people are foolish; they know me not; they are stupid children; they have no understanding. They are 'wise'- in doing evil! But how to do good they know not."
zh: “我的子民愚妄， 他們連我都不認識， 是無知的兒女， 沒有悟性； 他們有智慧行惡， 卻沒有知識行善。”

en: I looked on the earth, and behold, it was without form and void; and to the heavens, and they had no light.
zh: 我觀看地，地是空虛混沌； 我仰視天，天上也全然無光。

en: I looked on the mountains, and behold, they were quaking, and all the hills moved to and fro.
zh: 我觀看大山，它們盡都震動， 小山也都搖來搖去。

en: I looked, and behold, there was no man, and all the birds of the air had fled.
zh: 我觀看，毫無人跡； 空中的飛鳥也逃掉了。

en: I looked, and behold, the fruitful land was a desert, and all its cities were laid in ruins before the LORD, before his fierce anger.
zh: 我觀看，肥美田園變為荒野； 在耶和華面前，就是在他烈怒之下， 所有的城市都被拆毀。

en: For thus says the LORD, "The whole land shall be a desolation; yet I will not make a full end.
zh: 因為耶和華這樣說： “全國都必荒涼， 我卻不盡行毀滅。

en: "For this the earth shall mourn, and the heavens above be dark; for I have spoken; I have purposed; I have not relented, nor will I turn back."
zh: 因此，地要悲哀， 天必昏暗。 因為我說過，就不後悔； 我定了意，決不改變。”

en: At the noise of horseman and archer every city takes to flight; they enter thickets; they climb among rocks; all the cities are forsaken, and no man dwells in them.
zh: 因著騎兵和弓箭手的響聲， 各城的人盡都逃跑。 他們進入密林，爬上巖穴； 各城都被撇下， 無人住在其中。

en: And you, O desolate one, what do you mean that you dress in scarlet, that you adorn yourself with ornaments of gold, that you enlarge your eyes with paint? In vain you beautify yourself. Your lovers despise you; they seek your life.
zh: 你這被毀壞的啊！你在幹甚麼？ 即使你穿上朱紅色的服裝， 佩戴黃金飾物， 用顏料畫大你的眼睛， 你自炫漂亮，也是白費的。 愛你的人仍然鄙視你， 他們都在尋索你的命！

en: For I heard a cry as of a woman in labor, anguish as of one giving birth to her first child, the cry of the daughter of Zion gasping for breath, stretching out her hands, "Woe is me! I am fainting before murderers."
zh: 我聽到好像婦人產痛的叫聲， 正像生頭胎孩子的婦人疼痛的叫聲， 就是錫安居民 的聲音，他們喘著氣， 伸開雙手，說： “哎！我有禍了！ 在那些殺人者跟前，我發昏了！”
